name: Devka Beach
state: Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu
description: A lively, rocky shoreline famous for its adjacent amusement park, musical fountain, and food stalls — a great spot for family evening strolls rather than swimming.
history: Unlike the sandy Jampore, Devka is rocky and known for its tidal pools. The nearby amusement park has long been a staple for local entertainment.
famousFor: Rocky shore, amusement park, and evening food stalls.
